violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk low boy C2. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in cooler blower fan have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food Contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Ice was observed built up on the sandwich prep unit refrigeration unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment is to defrost unit. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
The outside dumpster was observed with an excess of debris and litter. Outside refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
